items.title: Apple announces Apple Intelligence-powered accessibility feature updates
items.content: Apple announced several new accessibility updates to features like VoiceOver, voice control, live recognition, and real-time caption generation for videos that will be powered

items.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
items.content: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

items.title: Spotify to adopt Apple’s new video podcast tech, offering creators easier cross-platform distribution
items.content: Spotify will let creators distribute and monetize video podcasts on Apple Podcasts using Apple’s HLS streaming technology, without changing their existing workflows.

items.title: Ransomware hackers claim breach at Foxconn, a major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia
items.content: A ransomware group has claimed responsibility for hacking the electronics manufacturing giant Foxconn and is attempting to extort the company.

items.title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
items.content: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

items.title: Microsoft’s carbon-removal plans aren’t dead after all
items.content: Microsoft is responsible for over 90% of the carbon-removal market, and reports suggested the company was pausing purchases entirely. This new deal should help assuage the fea

items.title: GitHub says hackers stole data from thousands of internal repositories
items.content: The code hosting giant GitHub said it was investigating a breach but said there was no evidence of customer data theft.

items.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
items.content: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late

items.title: An Option That Can Help Cut Housing Prices Catches On
items.content: Preapproved plans trim weeks or months off the process of getting a building permit. “Every month of delay adds costs that ultimately land on the buyer,” one housing expert sa

items.title: Giving Workers a Stake in A.I. Gains Traction
items.content: Gov. Gavin Newsom of California has floated a policy idea that’s getting attention in Silicon Valley: let workers own a piece of technology disruption.

items.title: Stocks Rise, Oil Prices Wobble on Impasse Over Reopening Strait of Hormuz
items.content: Nearly three months since the fighting began, disagreements remain over the fate of Iran’s uranium stockpile and transit fees for the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: StreetEasy’s ‘Reserve Your Future’ Is Taking Reservations for 2046
items.content: To celebrate 20 years in business, a New York real-estate site is offering restaurant reservations two decades in the future, an unusual offer in a city of short shelf lives.
